svg.title: KD-tree, query time
svg.desc: The query descends the stored tree of median splits to leaf B. The radius test finds the query ball crosses a split plane, forcing a backtrack visit to leaf A. Exact k-nearest-neighbor search runs over the four vectors in the two visited leaves.
svg.text: ball crosses — also visit leaf A
visited by this query — greedy descent plus backtracking
tree and thresholds come from the index built offline; in high dimensions the ball crosses nearly every split
